arts.ttl: James Maddison and Bruno Fernandes are easy choices in our Man United vs Tottenham COMBINED XI - but which big-money striker gets the nod up front and who lines up on the wings?
arts.sum: Ahead of the showdown at Old Trafford, find out who Mail Sport has included in our starting line-up - with a number of big names missing out.

arts.ttl: Man United vs Tottenham - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Erik ten Hag's side can leapfrog visitors with a win
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Manchester United host Tottenham in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag claims 'restrictions' have stunted progress at Man Utd
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of United's clash with Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday, Ten Hag admitted inconsistency will be natural due to the amount of young players they have recruited in recent years. Erik ten Hag has urged young players at Manchester United to improve quickly, insisting "restrictions" have stunted the progress of his side.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Tottenham dealt brutal injury blow moments before crucial Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Tottenham travel to Manchester United on Sunday afternoon but boss Ange Postecoglou is set to be without his captain Son Heung-min who will be on the sidelines at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: 'World-Class' Tottenham Star Ruled out of Man Utd Game as Early Teams News Leaks
arts.sum: Son Heung-min is vital to Tottenham Hotspur's form but they will have to do without him vs Manchester United

arts.ttl: Tottenham captain Son Heung-min will MISS Man United clash with injury after being forced off against Qarabag in the Europa League in midweek
arts.sum: The Korean was substituted in the 3-0 Europa League victory over Qarabag on Thursday night with a suspected hamstring issue.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Tottenham LIVE: Premier League team news, line-ups and more today
arts.sum: Manchester United host Spurs in Sunday’s late kick-off, with both teams looking for what could be pivotal points in the race for top four

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag explains why he has ditched Sir Alex Ferguson tradition at Man Utd
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has endured a rocky few years at Manchester United after replacing Ole Gunnar Solskjaer at Old Trafford and has got rid of a tradition started by legendary former boss Sir Alex Ferguson

arts.ttl: Mark Goldbridge Makes 'Shock' Man Utd Team News Claim on 490k-a-Week Duo
arts.sum: Mark Goldbridge has tipped Manchester United to start both Mason Mount and Bruno Fernandes against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's best Manchester United line-up after key injury update
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and gossip as Erik ten Hag will hope to be able to call on his entire United squad when key players return from injury
